name: White Metal Resources Corp.
summary: White Metal Resources Corp., a development stage Company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in the Provinces of Ontario and Newfoundland, Canada as well as in Namibia in Africa. It holds 100% interests in the Shebandowan project comprising the Vanguard property with 99 boundary and single cell mining claims covering an area of 2,107 hectares (ha); and the Far Lake property with 84 single cell mining claims covering an area of 6,269 ha located to the northwest of Thunder Bay, Ontario. The company also holds interests in the Pickle Lake properties with 4 claims packages located in the Pickle Lake area, Ontario; the Spike Lake PGE project consists of 107 single cell mining claims covering an area of 2,259 ha located in Ontario; and Tower Stock Gold Property that consists of 81 single cell mining claims, 11 single cell boundary claims, and four freehold land grants or patents covering an area of approximately 1,941 hectares located in Thunder Bay, Ontario. White Metal Resources Corp. is based in Thunder Bay, Canada.
